subject: Merge OpenTargets pharmacogenomics
description: Add mutation stubs and mutation_affects_molecule_response from OpenTargets pharmacogenomics using scratch-first GCS copy, validate zero dangling edges, then promote only if validated.
result: Merged OpenTargets pharmacogenomics. Promoted nodes/mutation.parquet, updated nodes/molecule.parquet, and edges/mutation_affects_molecule_response.parquet. GCS validate PASS: 3,205,619 nodes, 25,035,369 edges, total_dangling_edges=0. Coverage now 9/15 node files and 24/77 edge files.
